text: Quarter 1 For Tracks 1 and 2 ACOs, number of months of Parts A and B eligibility for the 12 month period used for first quarter (from quarterly assignment table in IDR); values from 0-12; will be missing if beneficiary not assigned in quarter (Q1_assign = 0); For Track 3 ACOs, number of months of Parts A and B eligibility for the year-to-date period used for the first quarter (from quarterly assignment table in IDR); values from 0-3; will be missing if beneficiary excluded in quarter (Q1_assign
